Notice Of Hearing Of Default Prove-Up
Off Calendar Feb-09-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Ernest Tachihara.
Dept. 514. Judge: Murlene J. Randle. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Giselle Casey, CSR #8098. Telephone: 415-551-3680. Email: gcasey@sftc.org.

Andrew Safont, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Ibarra Professional Law Corporation.
Crisostomo Ibarra, a witness for and principal at Ibarra Professional Law Corporation, was placed under oath and testified.
Both Messrs. Safont & Ibarra appeared via ZOOM for this morning's hearing.
No appearance by defendant Ernest Tachihara.

Plaintiff's Complaint for Breach of Contract and Common Counts was filed on November 20,2019, and was personally served on defendant Ernest Tachihara on December 5, 2019.
Default as to defendant Ernest Tachihara was entered on January 9, 2020.
DOE defendants were dismissed today, February 9, 2021.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Ibarra Professional Law Corporation, a corporation, and against the defaulted defendant Ernest Tachihara, a corporation, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $8,620.50.
Prejudgment Interest - $1,030.96.
Attorney Fees - $2,590.00.
Costs - $295.20.

Total - $12,536.66.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
